title: Marvelous Menagerie (DISCONTINUED)
description: Yet another addon for Unusual Prehistory, adding new creatures and plants!
body:
# THIS MOD HAS NOW BEEN OFFICIALLY DISCONTINUED AND WILL NOT RECEIVE ANY MORE UPDATES IN ITS CURRENT FORM AS AN ADDON.

# YOU CAN DOWNLOAD THE NEW MARVELOUS MENAGERIE: PARADOXICAL [HERE](https://modrinth.com/mod/marvelous-menagerie-paradoxical)!

# FOR MORE INFORMATION PLEASE JOIN THE [DISCORD SERVER](https://discord.gg/DCRXtazwSw).

Marvelous Menagerie is an addon for the Unusual Prehistory mod, adding some creatures and plants I think would be neat.

Right now the mod adds 12 creatures, 3 decorative animals, one plant, one mushroom with a woodset and one new tree with its complete woodset, along with foods and tools based from some of the creatures in the mod!

For additional info about these creatures, plants and what they add check the in-game encyclopedia or join either [my Discord server](https://discord.gg/DCRXtazwSw) or Unusual Prehistory's discord server.

### **Warning!** 
**Interacting with Hallucigenia might make flashing colors pop up, if you'd like to avoid this go to the mod's config!**

**The Creatures:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


Dodo
![The dodo mod, a smal plump bird with a fluffy tail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec77f50fcd81a2b9b56e9dc8539a1f88a686e023.png)

Elephant bird
![The Elephant bird, a huge bird with shaggy feathers and a bald head and neck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/955ff4de1f31726647389d7c1f6aa5eb8e3cd6f7.png)

Thylacine
![The Thylacine, a small orange dog-like creature with stripes along its back](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e658101922a1983672a2dec34ae0b88d1f15720d.png)

Steller's sea cow
![The Steller's sea cow, a huge aquatic mammal, related to the manatee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95819b896f3b6465322fe023ccc02447151992e7.png)

Anomalocaris
![Anomalocaris, a strange cambrian predatorian arthropod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef92d55701bd73bfb91f83a56c6c4ea3e86ac419.png)

Sacabambaspis
![Sacabambaspis, a tadpole-like fish with a goofy face](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0249162028988b4247128a97e75795964de1b7be.png)

Trilobite
(Curly, Trident, Moon, Spiky, Itty and Fat)
![Trilobites, small arthropods with many shapes and sizes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62a150a2ec62060cad653a69bad8861e83a4e102.png)

Ophthalmosaurus
![Ophthalmosaurus, a dolphin-like aquatic reptile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55c32a5ac0b210509d60172ea8c1acec9d4d2346.png)

Josephoartigasia
![Josephoartigasia, a giant relative of the Capybara](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9fb49b7014d52be772e3d4612502f09e58baa83.png)

Pikaia
![Pikaia, the earliest chordate discovered](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89d9d055dea145d08a6979004ba9b7a4690d0874.png)

Arandaspis
![Arandaspis, the earliest fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20dd70dcfb12b824b1309863edeb18898e255712.png)

Hallucigenia
![Hallucigenia, a mysterious organism](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d43c4709f7378b3c92f6b973d65e545a0ef2ed4.png)

</details>



Requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) and [Unusual Prehistory](https://modrinth.com/mod/unusual-prehistory-forge).


Added support for [Dye Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-depot) and [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions).

**Secrets:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Naming a Thylacine "metropolitan" will give it an alternate skin, based off of [this illustration](https://www.deviantart.com/sheather888/art/The-Domesticated-Thylacine-587339238) by Sheather888 of what a domesticated Thylacine could have looked like.

- Naming a Dodo "nugget" will give it a special skin.

- Naming a Trilobite "lgbt", "trans", "agender", "ace", "aro", "bi", "gay", "lesbian", "enby", "aroace", "genderfluid" or "pan" will give it that pride flag's respective colors.
  
- Naming a Pikaia "pikachu" will make its colors resemble those of the iconic Pokemon mascot
</details>
